allow: Bash(git commit -q -m 'Snapshot original Halpes Nuxt 2 template before Nuxt 4 migration *)
Bash(grep -vE "Failed to create plugin|at .*node_modules|at Array|at Object|at create|at perform|at execute|^\\s*$")
Bash(git -c core.safecrlf=false commit -q -m 'Migrate Halpes template to Nuxt 4 \(Vue 3 + TS\) and rebrand for Zahal Foundation *)
Bash(git -c core.safecrlf=false commit -q -m 'Consolidate to a single site header \(compact/Home-03 style\) *)
Bash(grep -vE "Failed to create plugin|Load plugin failed|at .*node_modules|at Array|at Object|at create|at perform|at execute|^\\s*$")
Bash(git -c core.safecrlf=false commit -q -m 'Add Sveltia git-based CMS for non-technical content editing *)
Bash(git -c core.safecrlf=false commit -q -m 'Add homepage budget pie chart; fix logo, ellipse-progress SSR, and wow.js *)
Bash(git -c core.safecrlf=false commit -q -m 'Fix BudgetChart hydration error: position donut segments via stroke-dashoffset *)
Bash(git -c core.safecrlf=false commit -q -m 'CMS auth on Vercel: self-hosted GitHub OAuth relay \(no Netlify\) *)
Bash(git -c core.safecrlf=false commit -q -m "CMS: point backend at the deployed branch \(dev-test\) and canonical repo case")
